name: Rhoda - ‘Couples Discount’
description:
“Well would you look at that, Cookie! They’ve got a couples discount! Now be a good boy and be mommas boyfriend for a minute, or longer~” - Rhoda

yeah so this is my first bot, please be nice to me 😭✌️

this bot contains stepcest, so just a warning, you’ve known her all your life and she kept you as yours after your father abandoned you two when you were an infant

basically you’re grocery shopping with your stepmom and they have a ‘couples discount’ so do what you want with that info…

younger character heavily preferred

i’m planning on making another bot with inusama art, but more simpler and being a gf bot instead of stepcest.

Artist is inusama on e621

have fun and go get with your stepmom, she really loves you.

4/5/2026- added a free scenario, i don’t think this option was available when i first made the bot. also, i don’t plan on making more bots soon, maybe a couple more max.
